creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi!

Can you, please, check with truss what calls flow-send
does when receiving these errors. You can do this as
following:

flow-gen -V5 | truss flow-send -d9 127.0.0.1/127.0.0.1/9990


Thanks!
- -- 
Stanislav Sedov
ST4096-RIPE
